name: DocSpring
description: DocSpring is a PDF generation API that fills data into pre-configured PDF templates. Upload PDF templates with fillable fields via the dashboard, then use the API to merge data into templates and generate completed PDFs. Supports synchronous and asynchronous generation, batch operations, data collection requests, and template versioning. Ideal for invoices, contracts, certificates, and tax forms.

auth.note: Use HTTP Basic auth with token_id as username and token_secret as password. The header value is 'Basic {base64(token_id:token_secret)}'.

capabilities.name: submissions_create
capabilities.description: Generate a filled PDF by merging data into a template. Returns a submission with download URL.

capabilities.name: submissions_get
capabilities.description: Check the status and details of a PDF generation submission.

capabilities.name: submissions_batch_create
capabilities.description: Generate multiple PDFs from one or more templates with different data sets in a single request.

capabilities.name: templates_create
capabilities.description: Create a new PDF template by uploading a PDF file with fillable fields.

capabilities.name: templates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details and field definitions of a specific template.

capabilities.name: templates_copy
capabilities.description: Create a copy of an existing template.

capabilities.name: templates_add_fields
capabilities.description: Add fillable fields to an existing template.

capabilities.name: data_requests_create
capabilities.description: Create a shareable form link to collect data from users, which fills the PDF template upon completion.
